scripts.install:all: npm --prefix social-app install && npm --prefix post-list-app install && npm --prefix profile-app install
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm --prefix social-app start" "npm --prefix post-list-app start" "npm --prefix profile-app start"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "npm --prefix social-app run build" "npm --prefix post-list-app run build" "npm --prefix profile-app run build"
scripts.test:all: concurrently "npm --prefix social-app test" "npm --prefix post-list-app test" "npm --prefix profile-app test"
